name: phishguard-js
description: Zero-Trust Web Dependency Security Interception Framework

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others -n "AGENT-HUB,SOC-DASH" -c "cyan,magenta" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"

author: PhishGuard Dev Team
